title: fibigia suffruticosa
intro: Fibigia suffruticosa, also known as the Chinese fiddlehead or Fiddlehead fern, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the Brassicaceae family. It has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Fibigia suffruticosa include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and treat digestive issues. Herbal preparations of Fibigia suffruticosa are typically made into teas, infusions, or decoctions, which can be used to treat various health conditions.
